_comment: Static card data for the reworked 98-design pool (7 premade 4-4-6 decks). Source of truth: docs/cards/decks/*.md + docs/cards/decks/README.md (decisions A-J) + docs/rules/keywords.md. Effect LOGIC lives in engine code (effects/statics/strength), bound in Phase 2 - NOT here; numeric tunables live in engine/config.py. Schema: id (globally unique snake_case), name, deck (owning deck slug), rarity, type ('unit'|'landmark'; landmark only for fig_tree/watering_hole, Eggs are units), tags (flat list of families + roles, [] for tagless), base_strength (int 0-10 or 'dynamic'), dynamic_strength (rule name iff base 'dynamic'; only Goliath/Chameleon), keywords (subset of Flight/Immovable/Fragile/Apex Predator; Battlecry/Deathrattle are text prefixes, not keywords), food_cost (int, only on 'Costs X food' cards), text (verbatim printed text).

cards.name: Prince Leo
cards.text: Battlecry: you may immediately play Princess Lea from your hand or deck.

cards.name: Princess Lea
cards.text: Battlecry: you may immediately play Prince Leo from your hand or deck.

cards.name: King Theron
cards.text: When one of your Cats covers an enemy unit, remove that enemy.

cards.name: Queen Adira
cards.text: When one of your Cats removes an enemy unit, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Jaguar
cards.text: Battlecry: remove an adjacent enemy of strength 4 or less.

cards.name: Serval
cards.text: Battlecry: remove an adjacent enemy of strength 6 or more.

cards.name: Snow Leopard
cards.text: Your other Cats may be placed onto enemy units of equal or lower strength.

cards.name: Black Panther
cards.text: Stealth.

cards.name: Lynx
cards.text: Battlecry: if you control another Cat, draw 1.

cards.name: Caracal
cards.text: Battlecry: if placed on top of an enemy unit, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Tiger
cards.text: Apex Predator.

cards.name: Cougar
cards.text: You may place this adjacent to any Cat you control, ignoring connection.

cards.name: House Cat
cards.text: Battlecry: if you control another Cat, play one more Cat from your hand.

cards.name: Eon
cards.text: Whenever a card is drawn, shuffled or removed, gain 1 food.

cards.name: Goliath
cards.text: This unit's strength is equal to the number of removed units.

cards.name: Ember
cards.text: Flight. When this is removed, shuffle it back to your deck.

cards.name: Aurum
cards.text: Fragile. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Rattlesnake
cards.text: Whenever you shuffle a card, gain 1 strength (wherever this is).

cards.name: Egg Eater
cards.text: Whenever an Egg is removed, gain 10 food.

cards.name: Black Swan
cards.text: The first time each turn you draw Black Swan, your opponent removes a random card from their hand.

cards.name: Peregrine Falcon
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: remove an adjacent enemy of strength 4 or less.

cards.name: Eagle
cards.text: Flight.

cards.name: Owl
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: look at the top 3 cards; draw 1 and shuffle the rest.

cards.name: Anaconda
cards.text: Apex Predator.

cards.name: Raven
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: draw 3 cards, then shuffle 2 cards back.

cards.name: Bird Egg
cards.text: Fragile. After 2 turns, remove this and draw 2 Birds.

cards.name: Snake Egg
cards.text: Fragile. After 2 turns, remove this and draw 2 Snakes.

cards.name: Queen Marabunta
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 4 food for each other friendly Colony unit.

cards.name: Vesper, Champion of the Hive
cards.text: Flight. Has +2 strength for each other friendly Colony unit.

cards.name: Queen Honoria
cards.text: Whenever you play a Colony unit, gain 4 food.

cards.name: Falstaff
cards.text: Flight. Whenever you gain food, gain 3 additional food.

cards.name: Nurse Bee
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: if you control two copies of the same Colony unit, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Nurse Bumblebee
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: if you control 4 or more Colony units, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Termite King
cards.text: Battlecry: if you control a Colony Queen, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Termite Queen
cards.text: Battlecry: you may play one additional non-Queen Colony unit this turn.

cards.name: Queen Bee
cards.text: Battlecry: play a Worker unit.

cards.name: Guard Hornet
cards.text: Flight. Has +5 strength while you control 4 or more Colony units.

cards.name: Soldier Ant
cards.text: Battlecry: if you control 4 or more Colony units, remove an adjacent enemy.

cards.name: Worker Ant
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 12 food.

cards.name: Worker Wasp
cards.text: Flight. At the end of your turn, gain 3 food.

cards.name: Worker Bee
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: gain 10 food; if you control another Worker, gain 10 more.

cards.name: Methuselah
cards.text: Immovable. At the end of your turn, gain 5 food.

cards.name: Borealis
cards.text: Apex Predator. Costs 15 food.

cards.name: Aquila
cards.text: Flight. Apex Predator. Costs 15 food.

cards.name: Bulwark
cards.text: Immovable. Costs 15 food. Battlecry: remove all adjacent units.

cards.name: Polar Bear
cards.text: Apex Predator.

cards.name: Rhinoceros
cards.text: Battlecry: remove all adjacent enemies of strength 3 or less.

cards.name: Hippopotamus
cards.text: When an enemy unit is placed on an adjacent crossroad, remove it if its strength is 3 or less.

cards.name: Andean Condor

cards.name: Elephant
cards.text: Immovable. Costs 15 food.

cards.name: Grizzly Bear
cards.text: Battlecry: in 2 turns, remove a random adjacent enemy.

cards.name: Oxpecker
cards.text: Flight. Gain 1 food for each unit in your starting deck with strength 6 or more.

cards.name: Black Bear
cards.text: Battlecry: in 2 turns, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Fig Tree
cards.text: Fragile. At the start of next turn, gain 20 food.

cards.name: Watering Hole
cards.text: Fragile. At the start of next turn, draw a unit with strength 6 or more.

cards.name: Fathom
cards.text: Battlecry: draw a legendary unit.

cards.name: Greywhisker
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 1 food. Draw 1 card. You may play 1 more unit.

cards.name: Rat King
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 4 food for each other Rodent you control. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Scrooge, Keeper of the Stash
cards.text: Battlecry: gain food equal to the food you gained this turn.

cards.name: Flying Squirrel
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: gain 10 food.

cards.text: Cannot be covered by enemy units.

cards.name: Chinchilla
cards.text: Battlecry: Draw 1 card. Next turn, take 1 additional action.

cards.text: Immovable. Adjacent friendly units can't be chosen by enemy abilities.

cards.name: Squirrel
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 10 food.

cards.name: Chipmunk
cards.text: Battlecry: gain 10 food. At the start of next turn, gain 10 more.

cards.name: Hedgehog
cards.text: Immovable. Battlecry: gain 5 food.

cards.name: Hamster
cards.text: Battlecry: if you gained 10 or more food this turn, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Muskrat
cards.text: Battlecry: if you gained 10 or more food this turn, remove an adjacent enemy unit.

cards.name: Groundhog
cards.text: Battlecry: if you gained 10 or more food this turn, gain 10 food.

cards.name: Gopher
cards.text: Battlecry: if you played a Rodent last turn, gain 10 food.

cards.name: Verminus, the Rat King
cards.text: Has +1 strength for each other unit you control.

cards.name: Pestis
cards.text: Battlecry: remove everything from an adjacent crossroad.

cards.name: Sirocco
cards.text: Battlecry: return all enemy units adjacent to this to their owner's hand.

cards.name: Gale
cards.text: Flight. The first time an enemy unit covers this, return that enemy unit to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Jerboa
cards.text: Battlecry: play another unit.

cards.name: Hornet
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: you may remove another Hornet from your hand or deck. If you do, destroy an adjacent enemy unit.

cards.name: Chameleon
cards.text: May be placed on any unit, and any unit may be placed on top of it.

cards.name: Skunk
cards.text: Return an adjacent enemy to your opponent's hand. They can't play it next turn.

cards.name: Lemming
cards.text: Battlecry: place all Lemmings from your hand and deck on random adjacent empty crossroads.

cards.name: Cheetah
cards.text: Battlecry: if you play this next to the opponent's base, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Rat
cards.text: Battlecry: remove a card in your hand to destroy an adjacent enemy unit.

cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: if you play this next to the opponent's base, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Bat
cards.text: Flight. Battlecry: draw 1 card.

cards.name: Mouse
cards.text: Battlecry: draw a Rodent.

cards.name: Lobo
cards.text: Has +2 strength for each other Canine you control.

cards.name: Shuck
cards.text: Battlecry: return a removed Canine to your hand. Give it +2 strength.

cards.name: Raksha
cards.text: Your other Canines have +1 strength.

cards.name: Clarion
cards.text: Battlecry: give +2 strength to all other friendly Canines.

cards.name: Dhole
cards.text: Battlecry: give all adjacent Canines +3 strength.

cards.name: Bush Dog
cards.text: Once a turn, when this gains strength, give all friendly adjacent Canines +1 strength.

cards.name: Jackal
cards.text: Whenever an adjacent unit is removed, gain 5 food.

cards.name: Red Wolf
cards.text: Whenever another Canine you control enters play, give it +1 strength.

cards.name: Gray Wolf

cards.name: Coyote

cards.name: Fox
cards.text: Whenever this gains strength, draw a card.

cards.name: African Wild Dog

cards.name: Dingo

cards.name: Dog
cards.text: Battlecry: if you control another Canine, play another Canine from your hand.

cards.name: Scout
